title: Party Pack
description: Bad decisions, loud rooms, and suspiciously sticky floors.

stories.title: Drunk Text
stories.template: At 1:47am, I texted {{name1}}, “I miss your {{adjective1}} {{noun1}},” and honestly I have never felt more {{emotion1}}.

stories.title: Karaoke Night
stories.template: I grabbed the mic, dedicated {{song1}} to {{celebrity1}}, and immediately {{verbPast1}} so hard my {{bodyPart1}} made a noise.

stories.title: House Party Disaster
stories.template: The party was going great until someone filled the {{room1}} with {{liquid1}}, knocked over the {{pluralNoun1}}, and blamed it all on a {{animal1}}.

stories.title: Group Chat Afterparty
stories.template: The next morning, the group chat had 94 messages, one blurry photo of {{name1}} holding a {{object1}}, and several witnesses claiming I was {{verbIng1}} near the {{place1}}.

stories.title: Bar Bathroom Philosophy
stories.template: A {{adjective1}} stranger in the bathroom grabbed my shoulder, stared into my soul, and said, “Remember: {{lifeAdvice1}}.” Then they handed me a {{noun1}} and walked away looking {{emotion1}}.

stories.title: Uber Home
stories.template: On the ride home, I requested {{song1}}, ate {{food1}} with my bare hands, and {{verbPast1}} directly outside {{location1}}.

stories.title: The Toast
stories.template: I raised my glass and said, “To my {{relationship1}}: may your {{adjective1}} {{pluralNoun1}} always {{verb1}} with dignity.” Nobody clapped.

stories.title: Mystery Stain
stories.template: Nobody knows how the {{color1}} stain got on my {{clothing1}}, but {{name1}} keeps saying it “smells like {{food1}}” and that feels legally important.

stories.title: DJ Announcement
stories.template: The DJ stopped the music and yelled, “Can {{name1}} please stop {{verbIng1}} the {{pluralNoun1}}? Security says it’s getting {{adjective1}}.”

stories.title: Party Foul
stories.template: The official party foul happened when someone dropped a {{object1}} into the {{drink1}}, {{verbPast1}} on the couch, and blamed a completely innocent {{animal1}}.

stories.title: Casino Night
stories.template: Things went downhill almost immediately during our casino night in {{city1}}. The moment we arrived, a man who looked suspiciously like {{celebrity1}} handed me a {{drink1}} and told me to "trust the process." Roughly twenty minutes later, someone accidentally used a {{noun1}} as gambling collateral, several people {{verbPast1}} near the slot machines, and security had to escort out a deeply {{emotion1}} {{animal1}}. The night officially ended when somebody attempted to order {{food1}} from the blackjack dealer.

stories.title: Birthday Party Meltdown
stories.template:
My {{age1}}th birthday started {{adjective1}}. Mountains of {{food1}}. Someone was already {{verbIng1}} at the speaker.

{{friend1}} claimed they once met {{celebrity1}} in a parking garage, then used that story to justify standing on a {{noun1}}.

An hour later, the kitchen turned deeply {{emotion1}}: someone spilled {{liquid1}} on a stack of important {{pluralNoun1}}. A loose {{animal1}} appeared from nowhere and started chasing guests through the house.

At 2am, someone tried to open a bottle with a {{object1}}. Three people screamed, one lamp died, two friendships ended. My neighbors called it 'psychologically exhausting.'

stories.title: Rooftop Party
stories.template:
The rooftop party in {{city1}} had an extremely {{adjective1}} playlist. Everyone holding a {{drink1}}, aggressively {{verbIng1}} whenever a good song hit.

Then a man claiming to be {{celebrity1}}'s cousin arrived carrying suspicious {{pluralNoun1}}. The mood turned {{emotion1}} after he used a {{object1}} as a microphone to give relationship advice to strangers.

It peaked when a completely loose {{animal1}} sprinted across the rooftop bar while music kept playing.

stories.title: New Year's Party
stories.template:
Our New Year's in {{city1}} was supposed to be classy. Then {{friend1}} arrived with six trays of {{food1}} and a backpack of {{drink1}}. Immediately {{adjective1}}.

By 10pm, a stranger claiming to be {{celebrity1}}'s 'wellness advisor' was {{verbIng1}} near the speakers. By 11, he had guests throwing their {{pluralNoun1}} into a fountain 'for manifestation.'

The mood turned {{emotion1}} after someone lost an entire {{object1}}. A loose {{animal1}} appeared upstairs with glitter on its {{bodyPart1}}.

Thirty seconds after midnight, somebody knocked over a massive {{noun1}}. The music stopped. From deep in the building, one voice yelled 'LET'S GOOOOOO,' and it somehow got worse.

stories.title: Boat Party
stories.template:
The boat party in {{location1}} sounded {{adjective1}}. Onboard, {{friend1}} cracked a bottle of {{drink1}}, dropped a tray of {{food1}}, and the captain looked deeply {{emotion1}} before we left the dock.

A guy claiming to work for {{celebrity1}} started {{verbIng1}} near the bow, yelling about 'energy frequencies.' Strangers threw their {{pluralNoun1}} overboard for 'good luck.' Nobody explained why.

An hour in, someone misplaced an important {{object1}}. A suspicious {{animal1}} got blamed. Glitter appeared on multiple people's {{bodyPart1}}. One guy started calling himself 'The {{noun1}}.'

It ended when a completely unrelated {{vehicle1}} drifted too close and everyone panicked at once.

stories.title: Drunk Uno

prompts.label: a punishment for losing a hand
a decision you all made together

stories.template: We were playing Uno with one house rule: {{rule}}. By round four, the agreed-upon punishment for losing a hand was {{punishment}}. {{friend}} stacked +4 cards until the deck ran out, and the {{color}} cards were no longer being used as cards — they were ammunition. When someone hit the {{object}}, the only sound in the room was {{noise}}. We did not finish the game. We did, however, unanimously agree that {{decision}}.

stories.title: House Party Cleanup

prompts.label: something you find in the couch
something you find in the bathtub
a description of the last guest still asleep
a vow you make to yourself

stories.template: {{host}}'s apartment looked like it had been hit by a confused tornado. In the couch cushions: {{couchFind}}. In the bathtub: {{tubFind}}. The carpet had a {{stainColor}} stain that was definitely not there before, and the kitchen smelled like {{smell}}. On the floor near the radiator was {{guest}}, who nobody could identify. The TV remote had {{missingItem}}. While carrying a bag of bottles to the door, {{host}} quietly muttered: {{vow}}. Then ordered a breakfast burrito.
